'''ragubu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:aveloz|aveloz]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-g-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aveloz|aveloz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| ragubu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rægibith|rægibith]] || [[word:rægibij|rægibij]] || [[word:rægibish|rægibish]] || [[word:rægibi|rægibi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ragugubuth|ragugubuth]] || [[word:ragugubuj|ragugubuj]] || [[word:ragugubush|ragugubush]] || [[word:ragugubu|ragugubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ragubuth|ragubuth]] || [[word:ragubuj|ragubuj]] || [[word:ragubush|ragubush]] || [[word:ragubu|ragubu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ragufbuth|ragufbuth]] || [[word:ragufbuj|ragufbuj]] || [[word:ragufbush|ragufbush]] || [[word:ragufbuf|ragufbuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:ragubuthu|ragubuthu]] || [[word:ragubuju|ragubuju]] || [[word:ragubushu|ragubushu]] || [[word:ragubuku|ragubuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:ragubuth|ragubuth]] || [[word:ragubuj|ragubuj]] || [[word:ragubush|ragubush]] || [[word:ragubu|ragubu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:ragubuthul|ragubuthul]] || [[word:ragubujul|ragubujul]] || [[word:ragubushul|ragubushul]] || [[word:ragubukul|ragubukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:ragubuthuthu|ragubuthuthu]] || [[word:ragubujuju|ragubujuju]] || [[word:ragubushushu|ragubushushu]] || [[word:ragubuku|ragubuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:ragubuthun|ragubuthun]] || [[word:ragubujun|ragubujun]] || [[word:ragubushun|ragubushun]] || [[word:ragubukun|ragubukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:ragubuthuoro|ragubuthuoro]] || [[word:ragubujuoro|ragubujuoro]] || [[word:ragubushuoro|ragubushuoro]] || [[word:ragubukuoro|ragubukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
